creator: marijn@stack.nl
text:
If I play mp3's with amp 0.76, my logs are filling with these messages:

Mar  6 00:52:32 hoop /kernel: isa_dmastart: channel 5 not acquired
Mar  6 00:52:32 hoop /kernel: isa_dmastart: channel 5 not acquired
Mar  6 00:52:32 hoop /kernel: isa_dmastart: channel 5 busy

I saw some old reports of the same bug and a message that it had been
fixed, but apparently it reappeared...
